description: An employee has submitted an expense report for a business trip, including airfare, meals, and lodging, with attached receipts.

nodes.task_description: Review the submitted expense report and attached receipts.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent reviews all line items and receipts.

nodes.task_description: Verify that all expenses comply with the company's travel and expense policy (e.g., meal per diems, approved hotels).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms all expenses are within policy limits.

nodes.task_description: Approve the expense report and schedule the reimbursement for the next payment run.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent approves the report and schedules the payment to the employee.
